title: FULC Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom FULC on August 21, 2025, netting in a 4.24% gain over 3 weeks
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On August 14, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Head-and-Shoulders Bottom Pattern (Bullish) for [Fulcrum Therapeutics](https://tickeron.com/ticker/FULC/) ([FULC](https://tickeron.com/ticker/FULC/), $6.60). On August 21, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $7.47. 14 days later, on September 04, 2025, [FULC](https://tickeron.com/ticker/FULC/) reached the target price resulting in a +4.24% for traders who took a long position in the stock.
